headline: Datadog GPU Monitoring Targets AI Costs As Shares Trade Below Estimates
summary: Datadog (NasdaqGS:DDOG) has introduced GPU Monitoring, a new observability product focused on GPU utilization, health, and costs across AI workloads. The product is designed to give unified visibility into fleet-level GPU usage and link hardware data to workload ownership and performance bottlenecks. Datadog is positioning GPU Monitoring to help organizations scale AI projects more efficiently while aiming to reduce wasted GPU expenditure. Datadog operates in application and infrastructure...
